description: A pure HTML5 Canvas 2D platformer using vanilla JavaScript - no build tools, no dependencies

files.index.html:
Score: 0
Arrow Keys: Move | Space: Jump | R: Restart
files.README.md:
# {{project_name}}

{{description}}

## Features
- Pure vanilla JavaScript (no dependencies!)
- HTML5 Canvas API
- 60 FPS game loop
- Platformer physics with collision detection
- Keyboard input handling
- Particle system
- Score tracking
- Moving platforms
- Animated player sprite

## How to Run
Simply open `index.html` in any modern web browser:

```bash
# On macOS/Linux
open index.html

# On Windows
start index.html

# Or use a local server (recommended)
npx serve .
# or
python -m http.server 8000
```

## Controls
- **Arrow Keys** or **WASD**: Move left/right
- **Space** or **Up Arrow** or **W**: Jump
- **R**: Restart game

## Project Structure
```
├── index.html          # Main HTML file
└── js/
    ├── main.js         # Entry point
    ├── Game.js         # Main game loop and logic
    ├── Player.js       # Player character
    ├── Platform.js     # Platforms (static and moving)
    ├── Input.js        # Keyboard input handler
    ├── Physics.js      # Physics calculations
    └── Particle.js     # Particle effects
```

## Game Architecture

### Game Loop
```javascript
// Standard game loop pattern
loop(timestamp) {
    const deltaTime = calculateDeltaTime();
    update(deltaTime);  // Update game state
    render();           // Draw everything
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}
```

### Entity-Component Pattern
Each game object (Player, Platform) has:
- Position (x, y)
- Size (width, height)
- Velocity (velocityX, velocityY)
- Update method (logic)
- Render method (drawing)

## Extension Points

### Add Collectibles
Create a `Coin.js` class and add collision detection with player.

### Add Enemies
Create an `Enemy.js` class with patrol behavior.

### Add Sound
Use the Web Audio API:
```javascript
const audioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
// Create oscillators for sound effects
```

### Add Levels
Modify `setupLevel()` to load different platform configurations.

### Add Local Storage
Save high scores:
```javascript
localStorage.setItem('highScore', this.score);
```

## Browser Compatibility
- Chrome/Edge 60+
- Firefox 55+
- Safari 12+
- All modern mobile browsers

## License
MIT - Feel free to use as a starting point for your own games!
